name: Math.Quaternion

values.name: add
values.comment: Quaternion addition: a + b

values.name: conjugate
values.comment: Quaternion conjugate: a*

values.name: dot
values.comment: The dot product of a and b

values.name: fromAxisAngle
values.comment: Creates a new quaternion from an axis vector and an angle (in radians).

values.name: fromRecord
values.comment: Convert a record to a quaternion.
values.type: { x : Float, y : Float, z : Float, w : Float } -> Quat

values.name: fromTuple
values.comment: Convert a tuple to a quaternion.

values.name: getW
values.comment: Extract the w component of a quaternion.

values.name: getX
values.comment: Extract the x component of a quaternion.

values.name: getY
values.comment: Extract the y component of a quaternion.

values.name: getZ
values.comment: Extract the z component of a quaternion.

values.name: identity
values.comment: The identity quaternion

values.name: length
values.comment: The length of the given quaternion: |a|

values.name: lengthSquared
values.comment: The square of the length of the given quaternion: |a| * |a|

values.name: mul
values.comment: Quaternion multiplication: a * b

values.name: negate
values.comment: Quaternion negation: -a

values.name: normalize
values.comment: A unit quaternion with the same direction as the given quaternion: a / |a|

values.name: quat
values.comment: Creates a new quaternion with the given x, y, z, and w values.

values.name: scale
values.comment: Multiply the quaternion by a scalar: s * v

values.name: setW
values.comment: Update the w component of a quaternion, returning a new quaternion.

values.name: setX
values.comment: Update the x component of a quaternion, returning a new quaternion.

values.name: setY
values.comment: Update the y component of a quaternion, returning a new quaternion.

values.name: setZ
values.comment: Update the z component of a quaternion, returning a new quaternion.

values.name: sub
values.comment: Quaternion subtraction: a - b

values.name: toMatrix
values.comment: Convert a quaternion to a rotation matrix.

values.name: toRecord
values.comment: Convert a quaternion to a record.
values.type: Quat -> { x : Float, y : Float, z : Float, w : Float }

values.name: toTuple
values.comment: Convert a quaternion to a tuple.
